rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts and row type by both extractors. Description refined by visual verification to 'contᵈ. Brot. over', which more accurately reflects the superscript 'd' and period after 'Brot.' seen in the original image. This refinement favors gpt-5-mini's interpretation for these specific characters over gemini-flash, but both were very close.

Description text is taken from gemini-flash, which was visually more accurate (e.g., 'Synodals' not 'Syndals', 'Kidl:' with a colon, 'Merton' not 'Weston'). Monetary values are taken from gpt-5-mini's interpretation, as visual verification confirms only dashes appear in the amount columns for pounds, shillings, and pence, indicating no numerical values on this row. gemini-flash incorrectly extracted '11' shillings and '8' pence.
rows.english_description: Payments of synodal fees and procuration dues for the parishes of Kidlington and Merton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payments of synodal fees and procuration dues for Kidlington and Merton; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Description text from gemini-flash, verified visually ('Downs' not 'Downes', 'Nov.' not 'Novr.', and the long dash after 1819). Monetary values from gpt-5-mini, confirmed visually as 8 pounds, 11 shillings, 8 pence. gemini-flash incorrectly read these amounts as 1 pound, 7 shillings, 3 pence.
rows.english_description: Payment to the gardener Downs, covering work up to 19 November 1819, billed.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the gardener Downs to 19 November 1819, amounting to £8 11s 8d.

rows.notes: Description agreed by both extractors. Monetary values taken from gpt-5-mini, confirmed visually as 1 pound, 7 shillings, 3 pence. gemini-flash incorrectly read these amounts as 13 pounds, 12 shillings, 6 pence.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the land tax for Coppin's House, amounting to £1 7s 3d.

rows.notes: Description text from gemini-flash, visually verified for 'Downs.' (with period), 'May.' (with period), and the '£ Bill' annotation. gpt-5-mini missed the periods and the '£' symbol. Monetary values from gpt-5-mini, confirmed visually as 13 pounds, 12 shillings, 6 pence. gemini-flash incorrectly read these amounts as 5 pounds, 5 shillings, 0 pence.
rows.english_description: Payment to the gardener Downs, covering work to 29 May 1820, billed.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the gardener Downs to 29 May 1820, amounting to £13 12s 6d.

rows.english_description: Payment to the bell ringers for Easter service.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the bell ringers for Easter, amounting to £5 5s 0d.
